_comment: Copy this to private-test-manifest.json (gitignored) and point each path at a PDF OUTSIDE the repo. Only aggregate expectations live here; NEVER commit real statements or real values. Omit any expected* field you don't want asserted. The runner skips entries whose file is absent, so you can keep the full hard-file corpus listed and run with whatever subset you have locally.

_fields.path: absolute path to the PDF (outside the repo)
_fields.expectedDifference: reconciliation difference (expected − statement closing); 0 when it reconciles

_hard_corpus: Recommended hard files to include when present: credit-union-credit-card-1.pdf, credit-union-business-1.pdf, rbc-business-1.pdf, rbc-chequing-6.pdf, bmo-business-1.pdf, td-business-1.pdf, cibc-credit-card-*.pdf, plus the RBC visa/business/chequing files already in your local set.

statements._note: Fully-worked example. Replace path + values with a real local statement.
